queries.question: What creative position is common to all marketing agencies?
queries.sql: SELECT Creative_Position.position  from Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions join Creative_Position on Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.position_id = Creative_Position.id join Marketing_Agency on Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.agency_id = Marketing_Agency.id   GROUP BY Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Marketing_Agency)

queries.question: Give me the creative position for each marketing agency.
queries.sql: select marketing_agency.name , creative_position.position from Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions join Creative_Position on Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.position_id = Creative_Position.id join Marketing_Agency on Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions.agency_id = Marketing_Agency.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?position WHERE {
  ?marketing_agency_creative_positions a :Marketing_Agency_Creative_Positions .
  ?creative_position a :Creative_Position .
  ?marketing_agency_creative_positions p:hasCreative_Position ?creative_position .
  ?marketing_agency a :Marketing_Agency .
  ?marketing_agency_creative_positions p:hasMarketing_Agency ?marketing_agency .
  ?marketing_agency p:name ?name .
  ?creative_position p:position ?position .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the creative position for each marketing agency.
